# Atmos Performance

> Atmos Performance provides professional-grade localized cryotherapy equipment for sports recovery, equine therapy, medical spas, and clinical practices. Our flagship CryoGun device delivers targeted cold therapy using medical-grade compressed CO2, reaching temperatures as low as -78C (-108F) for precise treatment applications.

## Company Overview

Atmos is a cryotherapy equipment company serving athletic training facilities, equine veterinary clinics, chiropractic practices, physical therapy clinics, and medical spas. We provide equipment, staff training, and ongoing support as a complete solution for businesses adding cryotherapy services.

## Products

- [CryoGun Device](https://atmosperformance.com/cryogun): Handheld localized cryotherapy device using compressed CO2. FDA Class I registered. Includes 2-year warranty, training, and 30-day satisfaction guarantee.
- [Book a Demo](https://atmosperformance.com/book-demo): Schedule a product demonstration and consultation with our team.

## Solutions by Industry

- [Sports Recovery](https://atmosperformance.com/cryotherapy/sports-recovery): Cryotherapy for athletic departments and training facilities. Research shows 30-40% DOMS reduction. Used by NFL teams, Olympic programs, and collegiate athletics.
- [Equine Therapy](https://atmosperformance.com/cryotherapy/equine): Portable cryotherapy for veterinary clinics and training facilities. Protocols for tendon injuries, laminitis, and post-exercise recovery.
- [Clinics & Chiropractic](https://atmosperformance.com/cryotherapy/clinics): FDA-registered equipment for chiropractic and physical therapy practices. 2-day staff certification. Applications for post-injury, musculoskeletal conditions, and chronic pain.
- [MedSpa & Wellness](https://atmosperformance.com/cryotherapy/medspa): Aesthetic-grade cryotherapy for cryofacials and body treatments. Marketing support included.

## Educational Resources

- [The Science of Cryotherapy](https://atmosperformance.com/cryotherapy-science): Peer-reviewed research, clinical studies, and scientific evidence for localized cryotherapy applications.
- [Blog](https://atmosperformance.com/blog): Industry news, treatment protocols, and educational content about cryotherapy.
- [Case Studies](https://atmosperformance.com/case-studies): Real-world success stories and ROI data from facilities using Atmos equipment.
- [Videos](https://atmosperformance.com/videos): Product demonstrations, treatment protocols, and facility walkthroughs.

## Company Information

- [About Us](https://atmosperformance.com/about): Company background, mission, and team information.
- [Contact](https://atmosperformance.com/contact): Business inquiries, support requests, and partnership opportunities.

## Key Facts

- Equipment: CryoGun handheld device using medical-grade compressed CO2
- Temperature: Reaches -78C (-108F) at the nozzle
- Treatment time: 30-90 seconds for most applications
- Warranty: 2-year coverage on parts and labor
- Training: 2-day staff certification included
- Support: 4-hour response SLA
- Regulatory: FDA Class I medical device registration

## Optional

- Training certification programs for staff
- Financing options available (36-month terms)
- Loaner unit program for service interruptions
